title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a built-in model library and OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLMs and embedders inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark/light themes, mobile friendly).

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with prompt history, syntax highlighting, and conversation management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub-Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + Streamlit UI to chat with local documents.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-made docker-compose stacks pairing Ollama with WebUI, Open-WebUI, LibreChat, etc.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that brings Ollama completions, chat, and code explanation directly into the editor.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama providing synchronous & asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, and embeddings.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth, rate-limiting, and usage logging in front of Ollama.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama written in Qt6 with chat history and model manager panes.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 or GCP instances with Ollama server pre-installed.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained .NET client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async chat and streaming generation.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama chat & embed endpoints with admin UI and API keys.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models and optional channel subscriptions.
